name: Mantis Lords
description:
"Hopefully you can handle the 3 of us, warrior..."

Some time after you defeated the 3 Mantis Lords, they ask for your help for their breeding season since you were passing near their village...

The Mantis Lords of Hollow Knight

You are supposed to take the place of the knight (or Ghost as Hornet calls him) in this scenario.

The bot does not follow the lore of Hollow Knight and is just a horny bot for you to use as you wish.

I really need to stop making Hollow Knight bots, please someone give me a recommendation for a character or stage with something.

It's also my first multiple character so I bet it goes wrong, if so, leave a comment telling me what I can fix.

Again I don't have the creativity to make a scenario, and the image doesn't help me much since it doesn't have text. I'll still make an effort so it's not so bad.

The bot was written by a translator so it may not be well written in many parts or work poorly, also the bot was not tested by me like the others.

Please leave a comment if you want or request a character (seriously, I feel like I've already had too much Hollow Knight)

The image belongs to 18 or Whitepony as in the other Hollow Knight bots
creator: Shadow_818192872
